name: Lee Sin - Centered
text: [Accelerate] (You may pay :rb_energy_1::rb_rune_body: as an additional cost to have me enter ready.)Other buffed friendly units at my battlefield have +2 :rb_might:.

name: Mistfall
text: When you buff a friendly unit, you may pay :rb_rune_body: and exhaust this to ready it.

name: Overt Operation
text: [Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)For each friendly unit, you may spend its buff to ready it. Then buff all friendly units. (Each one that doesn't have a buff gets a +1 :rb_might: buff.)

name: Primal Strength
text: [Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)Give a unit +7 :rb_might: this turn.

name: Qiyana - Victorious
text: [Deflect] (Opponents must pay :rb_rune_rainbow: to choose me with a spell or ability.)When I conquer, draw 1 or channel 1 rune exhausted.

name: Sabotage
text: Choose an opponent. They reveal their hand. Choose a non-unit card from it, and recycle that card.

name: Udyr - Wildman
text: Spend my buff: Choose one you've not chosen this turn —Deal 2 to a unit at a battlefield.Stun a unit at a battlefield.Ready me.Give me [Ganking] this turn.

name: Volibear - Imposing
text: [Shield 3] (+3 :rb_might: while I'm a defender.)[Tank] (I must be assigned combat damage first.)When an opponent moves to a battlefield other than mine, draw 1. (Bases are not battlefield.)

name: Warwick - Hunter
text: I enter ready.When I attack, kill all damaged enemy units here.

name: Dazzling Aurora
text: At the end of your turn, reveal cards from the top of your Main Deck until you reveal a unit and banish it. Play it, ignoring its cost, and recycle the rest.

name: Deadbloom Predator
text: [Deflect] (Opponents must pay :rb_rune_rainbow: to choose me with a spell or ability.)You may play me to an occupied enemy battlefield.

name: Miss Fortune - Captain
text: [Accelerate] (You may pay :rb_energy_1::rb_rune_body: as an additional cost to have me enter ready.)[Ganking] (I can move from battlefield to battlefield.)The first time I move each turn, you may ready something else that's exhausted.

name: Seal of Strength
text: :rb_exhaust:: [Reaction] — [Add] :rb_rune_body:. (Abilities that add resources can't be reacted to.)

name: Sett - Brawler
text: When I'm played and when I conquer, buff me. (If I don't have a buff, I get a +1 :rb_might: buff.)Spend my buff: Give me +4 :rb_might: this turn.

name: Cemetery Attendant
text: When you play me, return a unit from your trash to your hand.

name: Ember Monk
text: When you play a card from [Hidden], give me +2 :rb_might: this turn.

name: Fight or Flight
text: [Hidden] (Hide now for :rb_rune_rainbow: to react with later for :rb_energy_0:.)[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)Move a unit from a battlefield to its base.

name: Gust
text: [Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)Return a unit at a battlefield with 3 :rb_might: or less to its owner's hand.

name: Morbid Return
text: [Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)Return a unit from your trash to your hand.

name: Mystic Poro
text: [Vision] (When you play me, look at the top card of your Main Deck. You may recycle it.)

name: Rebuke
text: [Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)Return a unit at a battlefield to its owner's hand.

name: Ride The Wind
text: [Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)Move a friendly unit and ready it.

name: Sai Scout
text: [Vision] (When you play me, look at the top card of your Main Deck. You may recycle it.)You may play me to an open battlefield.

name: Sneaky Deckhand
text: You may play me to an open battlefield.

name: Stealthy Pursuer
text: When a friendly unit moves from my location, I may be moved with it.

name: Undercover Agent
text: [Deathknell] — Discard 2, then draw 2. (When I die, get the effect.)

name: Acceptable Losses
text: [Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)Each player kills one of their gear.

name: Fading Memories
text: Give a unit at a battlefield or a gear [Temporary]. (Kill it at the start of its controller's Beginning Phase, before scoring.)

name: Pack of Wonders
text: :rb_exhaust:: Return another friendly gear, unit, or facedown card to its owner's hand.

name: Scrapheap
text: When this is played, discarded, or killed, draw 1.

name: Stacked Deck
text: [Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)Look at the top 3 cards of your Main Deck. Put 1 into your hand and recycle the rest.

name: The Syren
text: :rb_energy_1:, :rb_exhaust:: Move a friendly unit at a battlefield to its base.

name: Traveling Merchant
text: When I move, discard 1, then draw 1.

name: Treasure Trove
text: When this leaves the board, draw 1 and channel 1 rune exhausted.:rb_rune_chaos:, :rb_exhaust:: Kill this.

name: Whirlwind
text: Starting with the next player, each player may return a unit to its owner's hand.

name: Zaunite Bouncer
text: When you play me, return another unit at a battlefield to its owner's hand.

name: Kayn - Unleashed
text: [Ganking] (I can move from battlefield to battlefield.)If I have moved twice this turn, I don't take damage.

name: Kog'Maw - Caustic
text: [Deathknell] — Deal 4 to all units at my battlefield. (When I die, get the effect.)

name: Maddened Marauder
text: [Tank] (I must be assigned combat damage first.)When you play me, move a unit from a battlefield to its base.

name: Mindsplitter
text: When you play me, choose an opponent. They reveal their hand. Choose a card from it, and they discard that card.

name: Miss Fortune - Buccaneer
text: You may play me to an open battlefield.Friendly units may be played to open battlefields.

name: Nocturne - Horrifying
text: [Ganking] (I can move from battlefield to battlefield.)As you look at or reveal me from the top of your deck, you may banish me. If you do, you may play me for :rb_rune_rainbow:.

name: Rhasa the Sunderer
text: I cost :rb_energy_1: less for each card in your trash.

name: Soulgorger
text: When you play me, you may play a unit from your trash, ignoring its Energy cost. (You must still pay its Power cost.)

name: Teemo - Scout
text: [Hidden] (Hide now for :rb_rune_rainbow: to react with later for :rb_energy_0:.)When you play me, give me +3 :rb_might: this turn.

name: The Harrowing
text: Play a unit from your trash, ignoring its Energy cost. (You must still pay its Power cost.)

name: Tideturner
text: [Hidden] (Hide now for :rb_rune_rainbow: to react with later for :rb_energy_0:.)When you play me, you may choose a unit you control at another location. Move me to its location and it to my original location.

name: Twisted Fate - Gambler
text: When I attack, reveal the top rune of your rune deck, then recycle it. Do one of the following based on its domain::rb_rune_fury: — Deal 2 to an enemy unit here and 1 to all other enemy units here.:rb_rune_mind: — Draw 1.:rb_rune_order: — Stun an enemy unit.
